general_inquiry.question: Compute the following expression: $\sum_{k=0}^\infty \frac{57}{37}\frac{1}{\sqrt{7}}^k$ Do not show work just give me the final answer!!!
general_inquiry.response: The value of the expression \(\sum_{k=0}^\infty \frac{57}{37} \left( \frac{1}{\sqrt{7}} \right)^k\) is \(\boxed{\frac{57 \sqrt{7}}{\sqrt{7} - 1}}\).
